prompt: SUBJECT: a single ornamental peony bloom with leaves, soft blush-pink and coral petals with deeper rose at the center, fresh muted green leaves spreading symmetrically left and right in a wide horizontal composition suitable as a bottom ornament. STYLE: hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving matching the attached voucher's peony illustration - warm ochre-sepia linework, flat natural color washes, no photorealism. FRAMING (critical): the ENTIRE bloom and every leaf tip must sit fully inside the frame with a wide empty margin of at least 15 percent of the canvas on ALL four sides; nothing may touch or be cut off by any edge. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no text, no border, no shadow, no yellow or gold color cast.
